body_txt: Bob's dead! How sa- wait, he was an unrepentant bigot? Never mind ... Everyone loves a good Hate Sink . Imagine, for example, an American film happens to feature Alice, an ethnically Chinese or Mexican character. She might speak perfectly good English, but she might also occasionally speak in her native language. While the other characters think nothing of it, Bob consistently harasses her , insisting she should only "speak 'Merican , dammit!" Rest assured: before the story is over, Bob will die the most humiliating death in the entire movie. Death by Racism is a convenient way to treat the audience to a visually satisfying death scene no one will feel guilty for enjoying . Sometimes Bob suffers as a form of revenge , but more often than not, he was just chosen at random by the show's real Big Bad , which makes this more of a Karmic Death . Bob's killer might even be a bigot themselves; it's just that bigotry was irrelevant in this particular killing. If the killer is also portrayed as an incompetent failure of a human being, see Sub-Par Supremacist . This trope is most common in shows that have a single Token Minority , but it can also turn up in shows with a Five-Token Band . When taken to extremes, it can become Narm or be an obvious Author Tract . Often overlaps with Bigotry Before Reason , Bullying a Dragon , or Mugging the Monster . Compare Politically Incorrect Villain and Asshole Victim . Contrast Vasquez Always Dies and Black Dude Dies First . When a character's racism directly causes their death, that's a form of Laser-Guided Karma . Note that if done badly, this could be a case of Strawman Has a Point and Felony Misdemeanor . If the target of the insult was himself an Asshole Victim , the outburst the writers considered irredeemably racist comes off to certain viewers as excusable (or simply not heinous enough to deserve death), and Bob's fate may not seem like the Karmic Death it was intended to be.               noreallife
